{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Visiri man
| species = Alien
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Visiri man]] with white hair and a shining golden eye in the center of his forehead appeared, coordinating colors with red energy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
